scripts.dev: concurrently -n "front,back" -c "cyan,green" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.install: npm run install:all && npm run env:copy
scripts.docker:restart: docker compose down && docker compose up --build -d
scripts.db:seed: docker compose exec -T backend npm run db:seed
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --prefix backend && npm run test:coverage --prefix frontend
